meta.title: Whale Land | Creative Services and Travel Experiences
meta.description: Discover Whale Land projects: Korean Birth Type, Haedurio, and C.O.V.E.R.T.

hero.title: We turn ideas into real experiences.
hero.tagline: Whale Land creates self-discovery content, travel support services, and mission-based tourism products.

about.title: A content studio connecting emotion and technology
about.body: Whale Land adds storytelling and thoughtful design to services people can actually use in daily life and while traveling. Our three projects operate as independent brands while sharing one goal: a simple, useful, and enjoyable user experience.

services.title: Three independent projects
services.description: Select a card to visit the official service website.

items.title: Korean Birth Type
items.description: A digital self-discovery card reading inspired by Korean traditional saju, offering a new perspective for understanding yourself rather than predicting the future.

items.title: Haedurio
items.description: A local support service that helps travelers in Korea handle unexpected issues involving bookings, purchases, deliveries, lost items, and more.

items.title: C.O.V.E.R.T
items.description: A spy-themed mission travel product that turns city exploration into a secret operation recorded through stamps and field notes.

contact.title: Visit each official page for the latest updates.
contact.body: Partnership and inquiry channels will be announced here when they officially open.
